message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
  DividerBorderThickness 2
  DividerBorderColor black
  DividerBackgroundColor white
  GroupBorderThickness 2
  GroupBorderColor black
  GroupBackgroundColor white
}

participant Admin
participant "Webhook\nServer" as WS
participant Consumer

== Register webhook ==

Admin -> WS : 1 Register webhook\nconsumer
WS --> Admin : 2 OK

== Event received ==

Admin -> WS : 3 Event
WS -> WS : 4 Store event\nin DB

== Consumer connected ==

Consumer -> WS : 5 Connect over WS

loop
  WS -> WS : 6 Load webhooks\nfrom DB
  WS -> Consumer : 7 Forward forwarding events
end

loop
  Consumer --> WS : 8 Ack messages\nby webhook ID
end

@enduml
```
